docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-21-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHAVEZ, GLENNFORD PEREZ HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
DECREE CHANGING NAME TO MATEO PEREZ CHAVEZ FILED BY PETITIONER CHAVEZ, GLENNFORD PEREZ

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR CHANGE OF NAME. THE PETITIONER HAVING BEEN LATE, THE COURT VACATED PRIOR RULING OF "NO APPEARANCE - OFF CALENDAR". PETITIONER GLENNFORD PEREZ CHAVEZ WAS SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT GRANTS DECREE CHANGING PETITIONER'S NAME TO MATEO PEREZ CHAVEZ. DECREE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: KAREN FARNSWORTH, #5162. (503)
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHAVEZ, GLENNFORD PEREZ JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for change of name. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, #5162. The petitioner having been late, the Court vacated prior ruling of "no appearance - off calendar". Petitioner Glennford Perez Chavez was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Mateo Perez Chavez. Decree signed and filed in open court. (503)
